_comment: A FAITHFUL fit-or-fold fish — the folder bed the detector exclusion needed. Loose preflop (vpip 0.48) + passive (AF 0.5) like spewy_folder_fish, but uses the overfold_factor lever (human_clone.py) to actually OVER-FOLD in play: it lays down hands that are pot-odds-correct to call, so it reaches showdown rarely (target live WtSD < 0.30). spewy_folder_fish reaches showdown ~70% despite its authored fold profile because the legacy fold gate maxes at textbook pot odds and never over-folds. This profile is the test bed proving the loose_passive sticky/WTSD axis EXCLUDES a genuine folder (its counter is bluff-more, the opposite of a station's). overfold_factor calibrated via detection_fidelity_probe.
